notes: V3-EXQ-543g: ARC-062 x MECH-309 monomodal-collapse falsifier with outcome-coupled REINFORCE P1 loss. Supersedes V3-EXQ-543f. Inherits both substrate fixes from 543f (one-hot augmentation: FIX 1; dacc_weight=1.0: FIX 2). Key change: P1 diversification regularizer (head_div + disc_var self-supervised) replaced with REINFORCE on GatedPolicy parameters. During P1 episodes, records (snap, sel_idx, ep_return) every RECORD_EVERY_N_STEPS=4 steps; after each episode, advantage = ep_return - EMA_baseline is computed and a minibatch REINFORCE gradient step is taken: loss = mean(-advantage * log_softmax(gated_score_bias / T, dim=0)[sel_idx]) - LAMBDA_DISC_VAR * disc_var_secondary. head_div_term removed: it caused symmetric cancellation (head_0->+X, head_1->-X gives composed bias = (2w-1)*X ~ 0 for w~0.5) without moving behavioral output. disc_var retained at reduced weight (0.1). EMA baseline initialized from P0 mean reward to avoid cold-start advantage explosion. Per-claim direction grid extended: if REINFORCE still fails to activate gating (TV < threshold at mid-training across all gated seeds), ARC-062 is non_contributory (deeper barrier than training signal gap); if gating is active but D criteria fail, ARC-062 weakens (architecture expressed itself but failed discrimination). 2x2 factorial, SD-054 bipartite layout, D2 AND D3 PASS rule, all pre-registered thresholds and metrics inherited unchanged from 543c/543d/543e/543f.
